75767.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-10-oleh-bezuhlyi-h7y6f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BlFxU2FyFTp%2BOkbTKqdg5mw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3z0hNFO0JcDIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrf4wmib~zx-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrf4wmib-zx
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk-on sentiment firmed as Bitcoin reclaimed $64K and Layer-2 momentum surged, with regulatory wins like Circle's bank charter offsetting lingering ETF outflows. Cautious optimism, driven by infrastructure and institutional adoption. 🏛️ Circle Wins Final Federal Approval for National Trust Bank Circle secured final OCC approval to establish First National Digital Currency Bank, N.A., moving its USDC operations into a unified federal framework and joining a growing list of crypto firms entering the regulated banking system. Shares jumped on the news. Read full story 🚀 Robinhood Chain Flips Hyperliquid, Tops $1B in DEX Volume Just one week after mainnet launch, Robinhood's Ethereum Layer-2 surpassed $1 billion in cumulative DEX volume, briefly overtaking Hyperliquid in daily activity. The chain has drawn nearly 350,000 wallets and helped lift the broader market's Layer-2 rally. More details 📈 SK Hynix Raises Record $26.5B in Landmark US Listing SK Hynix raised $26.5 billion selling 177.9 million ADRs at $149 each — the largest first-time US share sale by a foreign company, surpassing Alibaba. The offering was more than seven times oversubscribed, underscoring investor appetite for AI-memory chip exposure. Read more 🇯🇵 Metaplanet Explores Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit in Japan Bitcoin treasury firm Metaplanet is working with JPYC and Progmat to study tokenized, Bitcoin-backed credit products aimed at building efficient, 24/7 credit markets in Japan. No product has launched yet, but the move signals deeper BTC integration into lending. See details 🤖 Andreessen Lands Federal Reserve AI Task Force Role The Fed named a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen to co-lead a new AI productivity and jobs task force under Chair Kevin Warsh's policy review, placing a prominent crypto and tech investor at the center of the central bank's AI-and-labor policy debate. Read full story 🚨 Solana Genesis-Linked Wallet Drained of $14.2M A Solana wallet tied to the network's genesis distribution lost $14.2 million in a theft, renewing scrutiny over crypto security practices and raising fresh questions about the safety of long-dormant, high-value holdings across major networks. More details 🔓 Ledger Reveals Laser Attack Flaw in Tangem Wallets Ledger researchers disclosed a laser-based attack that can reset Tangem card passwords by

75764.subject: [Action Required] Identity Verification Advanced for EEA Users
75764.body:
Anti-phishing Code e2iWhGtX

Dear Bybit User,

As part of our ongoing commitment to regulatory compliance, Identity Verification Advanced – Proof of Address will be utilized for the categorization of users. You have been identified as a user with a completed, valid Proof of Address and confirmed your country of residence as part of the European Economic Area (EEA). If your country of residence has changed, please re-submit your Proof of Address.

Why is this required?
Bybit EU is our MiCAR-licensed entity authorized to serve EEA residents. Going forward, EEA residents (except for Malta) will be able to receive products and services through Bybit EU. Once our user migration plan is in place, access to services on Bybit Global will be progressively limited for users located in the EEA. Users will start receiving further communications about such changes in July. The right platform for you will be determined based on your country of residence, using your valid Proof of Address information.

What do you need to do?
If you are an existing user who has no up-to-date Identity Verification Advanced, please submit your current, valid Proof of Address at your earliest convenience.
You can update your Proof of Address here. ( http://url319.mail.bybit.com/ls/click?upn=u001.CaSbhUELMJv0fQMc2lSDT6KGdPabU83dpvSwrT0EseXsD9a2-2FZ9RIYbHR1Fs4p3T8xs4vVIX9pW2zXQ5uyNFAKJolTOL7q4ToYE0OE6GQUU-2BtOFxMlWTicN2wnez-2BDz44RKxQ8T-2FYfsxIy1gR2eDzDASS4bsOMlh-2B-2FNQ6oLC0ew-3DVhCm_mTOA-2BX07kQ2Ojbv-2BRbqdnpNrlwyNnm2KPByKJ9Ex4L2vKSlOXo5b9Zs41RNvLPkr1NnXoV-2FcPdW91qcbNZhKShJen3b1jWu9lT1-2Bl2O85gXIeXX2chQgWNpU6Byok6UDDGKWAGlDtATjmuL-2Fg5aoimhheB-2BL0yrmOen-2FL3dpzkD0efqq4I6zl4Fb08dNV4coNfKs9Y7pU-2BaF5wbSBzcT-2BTu-2FYYCaOD8WF15P-2BG4R9-2BDieN8td7W-2FIx1xnogxzEdU0ZuOAjnnGhVFFhmoceQnCxE0w5IizYnA7nfIDLGqH3MqZDm9QDUSg4srQeRJmj7TC4mVTRzgG2clOxvgG3n1k7Qs0e8PiViPkBLB6OdA97M3KvZi8sqrQ48DRJhVp8-2FX0EukBiDODS0OGmixLyWc3OZREgCnma1-2F6bX-2BdUmsfXvVKVQtoy5gAzpy1xXu8nXJYV7KbEt9uMQR53K78yz5pcFQtdurEf7vxBe40jxGWP2hLPvodO8CijRReHRsXV-2BL161OLqXThJsxVyB6oiZg-2F-2F96B6iZnQVw8ywlh2vN-2FDhn2SfQPdmp0XfasV7rKRNTROJybhH3jLiwqMOUuSC1BAo2CZ-2F-2B414vUzEZlA117WDv-2FwhFBGCAKAtOOx2MV8sirAZf2mBR-2F4wILMTPKN3iw38Wnef1WRhWnUhgggiKmfQryV-2FA6S1-2BALBGWheEbxLm28iBohAGtVLhJl-2BnoGsFGer501h4yT-2BkKQ-2FUvfA1OG6VRcG4SW0UHe3-2FKP2Mn9EUTypJUCOQLQo24kqy1DGrD9sijxv3ytQz-2FS-2FyJWmSTBM-3D )

75735.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 06/2026
75735.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice

75696.subject: SCONTO - výzva k odberu
75696.body: .apply-styles body{margin:0;padding:0}.apply-styles img{border:0!important;outline:none!important}.apply-styles p{Margin:0px!important;Padding:0px!important}.apply-styles table{border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0px;mso-table-rspace:0px}.apply-styles td, .apply-styles a, .apply-styles span{border-collapse:collapse;mso-line-height-rule:exactly}.apply-styles a[x-apple-data-detectors], .apply-styles u+.-wm-em_body a{color:inherit!important;text-decoration:none;font-size:inherit!important;font-family:inherit!important;font-weight:inherit!important;line-height:inherit}@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_hide{display:none!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_show{display:block!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_block{display:block!important;width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_max_width{width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pl10{padding-left:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pr10{padding-right:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pb10{padding-bottom:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-tac{text-align:center!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w107{width:107px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w150{width:150px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w270{width:270px!important}} Vážený zákazník, Vaša kúpna zmluva č. 3671916 je pripravená k odberu. Kúpnu zmluvu môžete uhradiť v hotovosti či kartou na pokladni obchodného domu alebo priamo vo výdajnom sklade na samoobslužnej pokladni platobnou kartou. Nezabudnite si so sebou vziať kúpnu zmluvu - budete ju potrebovať pri platbe a pri preberaní tovaru zo skladu. Štandardná doba výdaja sa zvyčajne pohybuje okolo 10 minút. V prípade rozsiahlejších objednávok alebo počas denných špičiek sa však táto doba môže výrazne predĺžiť. Ak chcete dobu výdaja skrátiť, zarezervujte si, prosím, niektorý z voľných termínov tu . Tovar pre vás pripravíme vopred. V prípade akýchkoľvek otázok nás neváhajte kontaktovať. Telefón: +421 222 11 55 65 E-mail: zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Otváracie hodiny Vami vybraného obchodného domu nájdete tu . Ďakujeme za Váš nákup a želáme Vám príjemný deň. Vaše SCONTO Potrebujete poradiť? Sme tu pre Vás celý týždeň vrátane víkendov 8-18h +421 222 11 55 65 zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Vše o nákupu Obchodní podmínky Starostlivosť o nábytok Odstúpenie od zmluvy Reklamácie Sledujte nás Prevádzkovateľom internetového obchodu sconto.sk je SCONTO Nábytok s.r.o., Nová ul. 8144/10, 917 01 Trnava, IČO 44731159, DIČ 2022821273, IČ DPH SK 2022821273, zapísaná v obchodnom registri Okresného súdu Trnava, oddiel Sro, vložka 25761/T.

75664.subject: Fwd: " Spoločnou cestou íst,v láske svoj život žiť, Oleh Novosadov a Ruslana Kozanchyn "
75664.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
Від: Oleksii Pushkarov <oleksii.pushkarov@minebeamitsumi.eu>
Date: пн, 6 лип. 2026 р. о 09:51
Subject: Fwd: " Spoločnou cestou íst,v láske svoj život žiť, Oleh Novosadov
a Ruslana Kozanchyn "
To: Oleg Novosadov <oleg.novosadov@minebeamitsumi.eu>




---------- Forwarded message ---------
Від: Martin Kovac <martin.kovac@minebeamitsumi.eu>
Date: пн, 6 лип. 2026 р. о 08:10
Subject: " Spoločnou cestou íst,v láske svoj život žiť, Oleh Novosadov a
Ruslana Kozanchyn "
To: Oleksii Pushkarov <oleksii.pushkarov@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Mario Trela <
mario.trela@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Jana Vattaiova <
jana.vattaiova@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Katarina Kochova <
katarina.kochova@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Alexander Koch <
alexander.koch@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Lubomira Novotna <
lubomira.novotna@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Adrian Lacko <
adrian.lacko@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Michal Urbanec <
michal.urbanec@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Jan Kristian <
jan.kristian@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Martin German <
martin.german@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Erik Kiral <erik.kiral@minebeamitsumi.eu>,
Lukas Belus <lukas.belus@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Rastislav Balogac <
rastislav.balogac@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Matus Baco <
matus.baco@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Volodymyr Vasylenko <
volodymyr.vasylenko@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Lukas Merges <
lukas.merges@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Attila Ambruz <
attila.ambruz@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Alin Micula <alin.micula@minebeamitsumi.eu>,
Tobias Miklos <tobias.miklos@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Oleksandr Danko <
oleksandr.danko@nmb-minebea.com>, Vladyslav Savka <
vladyslav.savka@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Denys Pohrebnoi <
denys.pohrebnoi@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Marek Kleri <
marek.kleri@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Karol Kamenicky <
karol.kamenicky@minebeamitsumi.eu>, MAINTENANCE
AUTOMOTIVE/KSC/EUR/MINEBEA@MINEBEA <MAINTENANCE.AUTOMOTIVE@nmb-minebea.com>,
Kosice AGA Process Engineering <ksc_aga_process_engineering@nmb-minebea.com>,
Dmytro Dovhulia <dmytro.dovhulia@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Yurii Zozulia <
yurii.zozulia@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Jana Benkova <
jana.benkova@minebeamitsumi.eu>, Lucia Hastova <
lucia.hastova@minebeamitsumi.eu>


Ahojte,

Chcel by som Vam dat na znamost ,  ze sa z lásky budú brať dna 26.07.2026
nasi kolegovia a buduci Novomanželia a to Ruslana Kozanchyn a Oleh
Novosadov .

Touto cestou by som chcel teda spustit symbolicku zbierku / pozdrav  pre
novomanželov, aby mali príjemnú spomienku na nas kolegov z prace,a
samozrejme aj nejaku malu financnu pozornost od nas, na lahsi zaciatok v
spolocnom zivote,


[image: svadba-svadobne-oznamenie.jpg]

Samozrejme vsetko na dobrovolnej baze,kartu s obalkou mam zatial u seba,
postupne ju budem posielat aj na ine zmeny, ak by niekto chcel v priebehu
zmeny, kludne sa za mnou zastavte,

PS: snazil som sa pridat vsetkych,ak som na niekoho zabudol,poprosil by som
o " doplnenie "

Dakujem







-- 

*Ďakujem,*

S pozdravom,

Kind regards,


*Oleksii Pushkarov*

Deputy - Line Leader
